honesty_note: This is a PLACEHOLDER catalog. Every pack below is marked "available": false and lists track files that DO NOT EXIST yet. No real audio ships with this repo. The founder must drop license-cleared, instrumental-only tracks into cues/<pack_id>/ and flip "available": true. Shipping placeholder tones as a product would be FAKE GREEN.

packs.title: Midnight Drive
packs.blurb: Moody synthwave beds for night-time montages and title sequences.
